content:
# Drop Shape Analysis

**Summary**: A method to determine surface tension and interfacial tension (IFT) by analyzing the profile of a pendant drop.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] used drop shape analysis (DSA-100) to measure IFT between diesel and TCFs.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The IFT between diesel and NaNO2 was lower than with NH4Cl, attributed to nitrite ion interaction. ([[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024, p. 63]])
